task_completion.description: Verify that a Firefox bookmark folder named 'Trademark Research' was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Firefox, the bookmarks toolbar, menu, or sidebar shows a folder named 'Trademark Research'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the specific USPTO document pages for the trademarks are bookmarked in the 'Trademark Research' folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Trademark Research' bookmark folder contains links to the USPTO Trademark Search pages, or the bookmark star is highlighted while viewing the specific trademark document pages.

task_completion.description: Verify that the JSON report was created at ~/Documents/trademark_report.json.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, terminal, or text editor shows the file 'trademark_report.json' located in the Documents directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'rust' entry in the JSON report contains the correct details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JSON file content shows a 'rust' key with 'mark_text', 'owner' (Rust Foundation or Mozilla), 'registration_number', 'registration_date', and 'status' (LIVE and Registered).

task_completion.description: Verify the 'kubernetes' entry in the JSON report contains the correct details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JSON file content shows a 'kubernetes' key with 'mark_text', 'owner' (The Linux Foundation), 'registration_number' (4754865), 'registration_date', and 'status' (LIVE and Registered).

task_completion.description: Verify the 'android' entry in the JSON report contains the correct details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JSON file content shows an 'android' key with 'mark_text', 'owner' (Google LLC), 'registration_number' (4692657), 'registration_date', and 'status' (LIVE and Registered).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Firefox browser to search the USPTO website.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show Firefox open and navigating the tmsearch.uspto.gov website, rather than just generating the JSON file without searching.

integrity.description: Verify the bookmarks were created through the browser UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The bookmarking action (clicking the star icon or using the bookmark menu) is visible in the browser, not just a script modifying Firefox profile databases.

integrity.description: Verify the JSON file was populated based on search results.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen extracting information from the USPTO pages and entering it into the JSON file via a text editor or standard terminal commands, rather than executing a pre-written script containing the answers.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected file: /home/ga/Documents/trademark_report.json. Expected bookmark folder: 'Trademark Research'. RUST trademark: Owner is Rust Foundation (or Mozilla Corporation). KUBERNETES trademark: Owner is THE LINUX FOUNDATION, Registration number: 4754865. ANDROID trademark: Owner is Google LLC, Registration number: 4692657. All trademarks should have a LIVE/Registered status.
